creator: stas@deglitch.com
text:
- The SIOCSIFADDR ioctl was dropped on FreeBSD 10.0.  Use SIOCAIFADDR instead.
  This PR depends on ports/165992.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-tun.c

Port maintainer (dgerow@afflictions.org) is cc'd.
